text:
复盘亏钱，90% 的人第一反应是"行情差"。

但行情差是背景，不是原因。同样的行情，有人亏 80%，有人亏 10%。行情解释不了这个差异。

有用的复盘是拆因果链：亏钱 → 仓位太大 → 追高加仓 → FOMO → 没有预设仓位规则。
一路问下去，根因往往不是你以为的那个。

检验方法很简单：去掉 A，B

Stop chasing 80%+ Win Rate traders

> Win rate range 57-65%

author: MichaelHirsch
quoted_text:
Merge two Slonks at the same level and one gets burned. The survivor moves up one level.

That means each level gets exponentially harder:

Level 1 = 2 Slonks
Level 2 = 4
Level 3 = 8
Level 10 = 1,024
Level 13 = 8,192

So with 10,000 Slonks, the theoretical max is level 13.
